scope: Cycle 28: Bug hunt C27 (OghamSelector never wired + 3D hardcoded Beith)

bugs_found.description: OghamSelector created in C27 (329 lines) but never wired into Hub→Run flow. After biome selection, code went directly to _launch_adventure() skipping ogham choice entirely. Bible s.2.2 mandates ogham selection before each run.
BroceliandeForest3D._update_hud() hardcoded Beith ogham (unicode \u1681, name 'Beith', cooldown 0) instead of reading ogham_actif from MerlinStore. Player's chosen ogham was ignored in 3D walk.

overall_assessment: Bug hunt C27 found 2 flow-critical bugs. OghamSelector was a 329-line ghost feature — fully built but never called. Now wired with signal-safe cleanup (is_instance_valid + explicit disconnect). 3D fallback logic improved to check OGHAM_FULL_SPECS.has(). 36 total bugs fixed across 28 cycles.
